name: xf_cep_c_upd_win_live
drl: rule W2 when accumulate( E0(tag == "y") over window:time(200ms); $c : count() ) then end
_finding: WINDOWED-accumulate live-modify property-reactivity gap (NOT item-C class 1/2/3; the flagged WindowNode do-not-hand-tune wall). A WINDOWED accumulate is property-reactive on the FUNCTION's fields: updating an irrelevant/no-op field (count()+tag) does NOT re-fire in Drools, but the engine re-folds -> OVER-fires. engine: W2[1] W2[1]; oracle: W2[1]. Plain accumulate re-folds on any modify (agrees); windowed sum(val)+val re-fold agrees (pr_cep_c_win_sum_upd). Needs a model_check_stream+WindowNode sub-recon.
